svg.text: High-level platform architecture · runtime prompt/control plane documented separately
task hints → best model · auto-optimize weekly
Translates Brain intents → validated tool calls · never exposes raw commands to models
Permission levels: L0 Read-Only → L1 Read-Write → L2 Shell → L3 Full Access
Pre-write snapshots · allowed_paths whitelist · blocked command list
WAL mode · single file · zero deps
Context zones: system · memory · tasks · dialogue
Logical isolation now · Process isolation later · Container isolation enterprise
Layered CI (unit/integration/e2e) | Event-driven proactive | TypeScript + Python
